CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id Int32, arr Array(Int32));
SELECT arrayElementOrNull(arr, 1) FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1;
SELECT arrayElementOrNull(arr, 3) FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1;
SELECT arrayElementOrNull(arr, -1) FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 2;
SELECT arrayElementOrNull(arr, -2) FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 2;
SELECT arrayElementOrNull(arr, 4) FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1;
SELECT arrayElementOrNull(arr, 2) as second_elem, arrayElementOrNull(arr, -2) as second_last_elem FROM test_arrays;
CREATE TABLE secondary_test (id Int32, val Int32);
SELECT a.id, arrayElementOrNull(a.arr, b.val) FROM test_arrays a JOIN secondary_test b ON a.id = b.id;
SELECT arrayElementOrNull(arr, 2) FROM (SELECT arr FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1) AS subquery;
